title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Instructional Designer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
